requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the RBI [Conduct of Government Business by
Agency Banks (ABs) - Payment of Agency Commission and Oversight of ABs]
Directions, 2026.
requirements.object: [Conduct of Government Business by Agency Banks (ABs) - Payment of Agency Commission and Oversight of ABs] Directions, 2026

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon its issuance, unless
indicated otherwise.
requirements.object: upon its issuance

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall be applicable to ABs.

In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them as below:
requirements.object: to them as below:

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) 'ABs' means all Public Sector Banks (PSBs), scheduled Private Sector Banks
(PVBs), scheduled Payments Banks (PBs), and scheduled Small Finance Banks
(SFBs) appointed by RBI under Section 45 of the RBI, Act, 1934, by mutual
agreement, to carry out Government Banking business of Central Government
(CG) / State Governments (SGs).
requirements.object: (PSBs), scheduled Private Sector Banks (PVBs), scheduled Payments Banks (PBs), and scheduled Small Finance Banks (SFBs) appoin

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) 'Agency Commission' means the remuneration paid by the RBI to an AB in
consideration of it acting as an agent of the RBI in conduct of general banking
business of the CG and the SGs at the places and in the manner specified in
the agreement entered between RBI and the bank, with the exception of the
functions relating to the management of the public debt.
requirements.object: the RBI to an AB in consideration of it acting as an agent of the RBI in conduct of general banking business of the CG and th

conditions:
where funds are paid in advance
by Government to the AB to cover future liability
requirements.full_sentence:
(c) 'Prefunded scheme' means an arrangement where funds are paid in advance
by Government to the AB to cover future liability, obligation or settlement.
requirements.object: are paid in advance by Government to the AB to cover future liability, obligation or settlement

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) 'Scrolls' means 'payment scroll' or 'receipt scroll':
(da) 'Payment scroll' means a physical or electronic statement submitted by an AB
that lists the payments made and claimed from the Government account at the
RBI for a Ministry or Department on a given date, used for accounting and
reconciliation.
requirements.object: scroll': (da) 'Payment scroll' means a physical or electronic statement submitted by an AB that lists the payments made a

requirements.full_sentence:
(db) 'Receipt scroll' means a physical or electronic statement submitted by an AB
that lists the receipts collected and remitted to the Government account at the
RBI for a Ministry or Department on a given date, used for accounting and
reconciliation.
requirements.object: statement submitted by an AB that lists the receipts collected and remitted to the Government account at the RBI for a Minist

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) 'Luggage file' means an electronic form of file in 'eXtensible Markup Language
(XML)' format reported by banks to RBI containing details of the transactions.
requirements.object: file in 'eXtensible Markup Language (XML)' format reported by banks to RBI containing details of the transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the applicable Acts, Rules/ Regulations made thereunder,
or any Statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of terms published by
RBI as used in common or commercial parlance, as the case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the applicable Acts, Rules/ Regulations made thereunder, or any Statutory modification or re

requirements.full_sentence:
A CG Ministry/ Department (in consultation with CGA) and a SG Department [in
consultation with the respective Accountant General's (AG) Office], respectively, may
engage any bank for implementation of any of the prefunded schemes without reference
to RBI.
requirements.object: implementation of any of the prefunded schemes without reference to RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
All ABs shall scrupulously comply with the instructions issued by Government
(Central as well as States), without waiting for any further instructions from RBI.
requirements.object: instructions issued by Government (Central as well as States), without waiting for any further instructions from RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
For
queries related to such instructions, ABs shall take up directly with the respective
Government.
requirements.object: the respective Government

requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, for queries related to reporting to RBI, ABs shall take up with
DGBA/ Central Accounts Section (CAS), Nagpur, RBI.
requirements.object: Central Accounts Section (CAS), Nagpur, RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
ABs paying their own tax liabilities through their own branches or through
authorised branches of any other AB, including State Bank of India (SBI) or
offices of RBI, wherever they do not have their own authorised direct tax
collection branch, should indicate the same separately in the scrolls
ii.
requirements.object: in the scrolls ii

requirements.full_sentence:
Prefunded schemes, which may be implemented by a CG Ministry/ Department
(in consultation with CGA) or a SG department
vi.
requirements.object: CG Ministry/ Department (in consultation with CGA) or a SG department vi

requirements.full_sentence:
ABs shall meticulously follow the instructions issued by RBI from time-to-time
regarding transactions which are not eligible for agency commission.
requirements.object: issued by RBI from time-to-time regarding transactions which are not eligible for agency commission

requirements.full_sentence:
All the transactions, i.e., receipt, payment, penalty,
interest, etc., shall be directly reported to the CAS on a daily basis similar to the
transactions of Public Provident Fund (PPF) Scheme, in order to maintain uniformity in
reporting, reconciliation and accounting.
requirements.object: the CAS on a daily basis similar to the transactions of Public Provident Fund (PPF) Scheme, in order to maintain uniformity in

requirements.full_sentence:
The ABs shall observe the rules and regulations of the
respective schemes.
requirements.object: regulations of the respective schemes

requirements.full_sentence:
Pecuniary liabilities, if any, arising from such non-observance shall be borne entirely by
the AB.
requirements.object: the AB

requirements.full_sentence:
After the operationalisation of NEFT 24x7 and RTGS 24x7, ABs authorised to collect
Goods and Services Tax (GST), Customs and Central Excise Duties through Indian
Customs Electronic Data Interchange (EDI) Gateway (ICEGATE), Direct Taxes under
Tax Information Network (TIN) 2.0 channel, shall upload their luggage files in RBI's
Quantum Payments Exchange (QPX)/ e-Kuber on all days except the Global Holidays.
requirements.object: in RBI's Quantum Payments Exchange (QPX)/ e-Kuber on all days except the Global Holidays

requirements.full_sentence:
These luggage files shall be uploaded in RBI's QPX/ e-Kuber at or before 1800 hours
prescribed by the Office of Principal Chief Controller of Accounts (Pr.
requirements.object: QPX/ e-Kuber at or before 1800 hours prescribed by the Office of Principal Chief Controller of Accounts (Pr

requirements.full_sentence:
The SG transactions (electronic as well as physical mode) of previous month
reported after fourth of the succeeding month and those pertaining to earlier months
should be reported for accounting to RBI through a separate statement after
confirmation by the competent authorities of the SG.
requirements.object: to RBI through a separate statement after confirmation by the competent authorities of the SG

conditions: if reported after a gap of 90 days from the date of transaction
requirements.full_sentence:
For CG transactions (electronic as well as physical mode), or any adjustments
thereof, if reported after a gap of 90 days from the date of transaction, ABs must obtain
prior approval from the respective Ministry/Department and submit the same to RBI
separately at the time of reporting such transactions for settlement.
requirements.object: the respective Ministry/Department and submit the same to RBI separately at the time of reporting such transactions for set

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to maintain uniformity in reporting, reconciliation, and accounting, ABs shall
report the GMS transactions, i.e., receipt, payment, penalty, interest, commission for
mobilisation, handling charges, etc., directly through the Government account
maintained for the purpose at CAS, on a daily basis as in the case of the transactions
of Public Provident Fund (PPF) Scheme, 2019.
requirements.object: i

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, banks shall make payment of interest to
the depositors on the respective due dates and thereafter raise claim to Government
through CAS.
requirements.object: to the depositors on the respective due dates and thereafter raise claim to Government through CAS

requirements.full_sentence:
For
example, challan generated electronically and submitted to AB, along with cash/
instrument, should be treated as transaction under physical mode.
requirements.object: under physical mode

requirements.full_sentence:
A Challan Identification Number (CIN), generated after successful processing of a
single Common Portal Identification Number (CPIN), under GST payment process,
should be treated as a single transaction, even if multiple major head/ sub-major head/
minor head of accounts are credited.
requirements.object: single transaction, even if multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head of accounts are credited

requirements.full_sentence:
All such records
clubbed under a single challan, i.e., CPIN, must be treated as a single transaction for
the purpose of claiming agency commission (effective July 01, 2017).
requirements.object: single transaction for the purpose of claiming agency commission (effective July 01, 2017)

conditions: in case of transactions not covered under GST
requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, in case of transactions not covered under GST, a single challan (electronic
or physical) should be treated as single transaction only and not as multiple transactions,
even if the challan contains multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head of
accounts that will get credited.
requirements.object: transaction only and not as multiple transactions, even if the challan contains multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head o

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, records clubbed under a single challan
processed successfully must be treated as a single transaction for the purpose of
claiming agency commission.
requirements.object: single transaction for the purpose of claiming agency commission

requirements.full_sentence:
ABs shall submit their claims for agency commission in the prescribed format (with
GST details) to CAS in respect of CG transactions, and to the respective RO of RBI for
SG transactions, respectively.
requirements.object: agency commission in the prescribed format (with GST details) to CAS in respect of CG transactions, and to the respective RO o

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, all
authorized ABs shall submit their agency commission claims pertaining to these receipt
transactions to Mumbai RO.
requirements.object: claims pertaining to these receipt transactions to Mumbai RO

requirements.full_sentence:
ABs shall furnish their claims for agency commission to RBI within 60 calendar days,
from the end of the quarter in which the transactions were conducted.
requirements.object: agency commission to RBI within 60 calendar days, from the end of the quarter in which the transactions were conducted

conditions:
If banks fail to
furnish claims within the stipulated period
requirements.full_sentence:
If banks fail to
furnish claims within the stipulated period, any subsequent submissions to the RBI must
be accompanied by a formal explanation, detailing the reasons for the delay.
requirements.object: formal explanation, detailing the reasons for the delay

requirements.full_sentence:
All ABs shall submit agency commission claims related to Special Deposit Scheme
(SDS) transactions to CAS on a quarterly basis.
requirements.object: related to Special Deposit Scheme (SDS) transactions to CAS on a quarterly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
However, ABs shall continue to claim reimbursement of both the interest paid and the
withdrawals from the respective ROs of RBI in which the mirror accounts are maintained.
requirements.object: of both the interest paid and the withdrawals from the respective ROs of RBI in which the mirror accounts are maintain

requirements.full_sentence:
ABs shall ensure that agency commission claims are submitted in prescribed format
and are accurate.
requirements.object: claims are submitted in prescribed format and are accurate

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to this, ABs shall ensure that their internal inspectors/
auditors, during the course of their inspection/ audit, verify the agency commission
claims submitted by their branches and confirm their accuracy.
requirements.object: inspectors/ auditors, during the course of their inspection/ audit, verify the agency commission claims submitted by their

requirements.full_sentence:
ABs shall submit the agency commission claims, including applicable GST amount,
as per prescribed agency commission rates, to respective ROs/ CAS as per extant
instructions of RBI.
requirements.object: claims, including applicable GST amount, as per prescribed agency commission rates, to respective ROs/ CAS as per extant

requirements.full_sentence:
TDS on GST shall be deducted as applicable by RBI at the time of
paying agency commission in accordance with the Government instructions.
requirements.object: by RBI at the time of paying agency commission in accordance with the Government instructions

requirements.full_sentence:
The number of transactions eligible for agency commission should not exceed 14
per pensioner per Financial Year.
requirements.object: per Financial Year

requirements.full_sentence:
In other words, any payment of arrears on account of late start/ restart of
pension should be treated as a single credit transaction and not as separate monthly
credits.
requirements.object: single credit transaction and not as separate monthly credits

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) At 75% of the applicable rate, where the dealing branch is required to account for
the transaction by passing on the scrolls and documents to the local/ nearest
branch of RBI or to any AB conducting Government business
requirements.object: transaction by passing on the scrolls and documents to the local/ nearest branch of RBI or to any AB conducting Government business

requirements.full_sentence:
All ABs should settle their agency transactions for both funds and agency
commission directly with the respective RO of RBI instead of routing them through any
other AB that acts as an aggregator in certain cases.
requirements.object: for both funds and agency commission directly with the respective RO of RBI instead of routing them through any other

requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, payments made by ABs,
on behalf of SGs should be directly settled with the respective RO of RBI.
requirements.object: the respective RO of RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
Agency
transaction details/ scrolls shall be forwarded directly by individual AB to the respective
SG/ Treasury.
requirements.object: individual AB to the respective SG/ Treasury

requirements.full_sentence:
As stated above, transactions which
do not involve physical receipt of cash/ instruments should be treated as 'Receipts-e-
mode'.
requirements.object: mode'

requirements.full_sentence:
ABs should not claim commission for such transactions, as applicable for
physical receipts, on the basis that mandate to transfer the amount to Government was
submitted physically.
requirements.object: transactions, as applicable for physical receipts, on the basis that mandate to transfer the amount to Government was submit

requirements.full_sentence:
As per the agreement between the AB and the RBI, violation or non-compliance of
instructions issued by Government and/or RBI shall attract imposition of penalty.

requirements.timeline:
within 30 days from the date
of communication of the action points
requirements.full_sentence:
(b) Comments in respect of action points marked as 'Major' should be submitted to
the ROs of RBI, under which the branch/ office falls, within 30 days from the date
of communication of the action points
requirements.object: ROs of RBI, under which the branch/ office falls, within 30 days from the date of communication of the action points

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) For 'Other' action points, necessary rectification should be ensured by the bank
itself.
requirements.object: bank itself

requirements.full_sentence:
The quality and sustenance of compliance to such 'other' action points
should also be examined and commented upon by internal audit
requirements.object: commented upon by internal audit

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) As a part of offsite monitoring of Government business, ABs should report details
of their Government business as per the formats enclosed in Annex 3 and Annex
requirements.object: Government business as per the formats enclosed in Annex 3 and Annex

requirements.full_sentence:
The completed statements should be e-mailed to dgbaomc@rbi.org.in, with a
copy to the RO of RBI under whose jurisdiction the bank falls.

Systems and controls for conduct of Government Banking: In addition to the
existing instructions, ABs shall ensure that internal/ concurrent audit at bank branches
verifies whether Government business is being conducted as per rules and regulations
prescribed by Government/ RBI, including examination of, among other things, agency
commission claims, pension payments, etc.
requirements.object: audit at bank branches verifies whether Government business is being conducted as per rules and regulations prescribe

requirements.full_sentence:
A checklist shall be provided to the
inspecting officers/auditors, which shall, at a minimum, include the illustrative items
given at Annex 6.
requirements.object: inspecting officers/auditors, which shall, at a minimum, include the illustrative items given at Annex 6

requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions and guidelines
already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these
Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
requirements.object: affect:

requirements.full_sentence:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those Directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelin

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions, the
Reserve Bank̥ may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any
matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the
Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.

Total (3 + 6 + 9) Beginning of
End of Quarter
Quarter
Number of pension accounts
**Agency Banks (ABs) paying their own tax liabilities through their own branches or through
authorised branches of any other AB (including SBI) wherever they do not have their own
authorised direct tax collection branches should indicate the same separately in the scroll and
such transactions will not be eligible for payment of agency commission.
requirements.object: in the scroll and such transactions will not be eligible for payment of agency commission

requirements.full_sentence:
Annex 6
Checklist relating to Government Business for internal / concurrent audit
Part A: Agency commission claims
Internal inspectors/auditors shall verify the agency commission claims
submitted by branches and confirm their accuracy during the course of their
inspection/audit.
requirements.object: claims submitted by branches and confirm their accuracy during the course of their inspection/audit

requirements.full_sentence:
The following shall be specifically examined during the
course of internal/concurrent audit at Agency Bank (AB) branches:
requirements.object: the course of internal/concurrent audit at Agency Bank (AB) branches:

requirements.full_sentence:
Whether the entries in the registers/printouts relating to agency
commission claims are properly authenticated
Part B: Pension / Government Business related issues
Internal inspections should assess branch performance in servicing
pensioner customers.
requirements.object: servicing pensioner customers

requirements.full_sentence: In this regard, the following shall be ensured:

A specific questionnaire covering all aspects of pension payment shall
be devised for use during inspection of pension paying branches
requirements.object: during inspection of pension paying branches

requirements.full_sentence:
Inspecting officers shall also, during inspections, call up pensioners at
random and enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related
services
requirements.object: up pensioners at random and enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related services

requirements.full_sentence:
A detailed checklist relating to pension payments/Government
business shall be given by banks to internal auditors/inspectors in
order to adhere to the recommendations of the Prabhakar Rao
Committee, constituted by the GoI, relating to pension
payments/Government business.
requirements.object: to internal auditors/inspectors in order to adhere to the recommendations of the Prabhakar Rao Committee, constituted by the GoI, re
